error.signature: xacro: error: XML parsing error: not well-formed (invalid token)

verdict.summary: XACRO/URDF file has XML syntax errors or undefined xacro macros/properties.

dead_ends.action: Edit the URDF file that xacro generates instead of the .xacro source
dead_ends.why_fails: Generated URDF is overwritten on each build; edits are lost

dead_ends.action: Ignore xacro and write raw URDF for complex robots
dead_ends.why_fails: Raw URDF is unmaintainable at scale; loses parameterization, macros, and math expressions

workarounds.action: Run xacro standalone to get a clear error with line numbers
Check all xacro:property and xacro:macro definitions are included
workarounds.how: Verify all <xacro:include filename='...' /> paths are correct

workarounds.action: Use check_urdf to validate the generated URDF

leads_to.condition: Invalid URDF means robot_state_publisher publishes no TF frames
